title: Update gascity-next to 1.0.0-1100.bc6058d

title: Update gascity-next to 1.0.0-1100.bc6058d

title: gnu: gascity-next: Update to 1.0.0-1078.5a75cf9.
description: Update gascity-next package to latest upstream commit 5a75cf9c3d6d240fe05e7a7406f5a74d4f890380. Upstream has a v1.0.0 release tag now.

title: gnu: gastown-next: Fix build with latest beads/dolt
description: After updating beads-next to 1.0.2-25 and bumping go-github-com-dolthub-driver to include the MultiEnvForConfigAndDirectory API fix, gastown-next still fails to build. It needs: (1) fix-embedded-symlinks phase extended to cover internal/storage/schema/migrations (new //go:embed migrations/*.up.sql directive in beads), src/github.com/dolthub/dolt/go/libraries/doltcore/doltdb (AGENT.md), and src/github.com/dolthub/go-mysql-server/sql/encodings (weight maps); (2) additional native-inputs for dolt CLI transitive deps (go-github-com-abiosoft-readline, go-github-com-dolthub-ishell, go-github-com-andreyvit-diff, go-github-com-flynn-archive-go-shlex, go-github-com-google-shlex, go-github-com-google-go-github-v57, go-github-com-pkg-profile, go-github-com-skratchdot-open-golang, go-github-com-tealeg-xlsx). Gastown-next was already broken before this update because the previous beads-next could not build against dolt 1.86.3.
close_reason: gastown-next now builds with go 1.25, extended fix-embedded-symlinks for beads migrations/dolt AGENT.md/go-mysql-server weight maps, added icu4c and transitive dolt CLI Go deps

title: gnu: beads-next: Update to 1.0.2-25.d57dc71
description: Update beads-next and go-github-com-steveyegge-beads packages to latest upstream commit d57dc7128a8657bcd462a4aa3a66da92d227a15a (25 commits past v1.0.2). Previous: 1.0.0-106.7217026. Includes dep bumps (otel 1.42→1.43, anthropic-sdk 1.27.1→1.37.0, lipgloss 2.0.2→2.0.3, various charmbracelet/x, etc).
close_reason: beads-next and go-github-com-steveyegge-beads updated to 1.0.2-25.d57dc71; go-github-com-dolthub-driver bumped to HEAD commit 81fe8ba to match dolt v1.86.3 MultiEnvForConfigAndDirectory API

title: Update dolt and its dependencies to latest

title: gnu: gascity-next: Update to latest commit

title: Build and lint updated dolt + deps

title: Bump dolt + go-github-com-dolthub-dolt-go to v1.86.1
description: Upstream v1.86.1 released 2026-04-10 (commit 91938a776b02). Update version and sha256 for both go-github-com-dolthub-dolt-go (library) and dolt (CLI). Verify snippets still apply; re-review propagated-inputs vs new go.mod.

title: Bump go-github-com-dolthub-go-mysql-server to 2026-04-08 pseudo-version
description: dolt v1.86.1 go.mod pins v0.20.1-0.20260408230922-6d219f1e7c8d (commit 6d219f1e7c8d). Update version, commit, and sha256.

title: Bump go-github-com-dolthub-fslock to 20251215 pseudo-version
description: dolt v1.86.1 go.mod pins fslock v0.0.0-20251215194149-ef20baba2318. The current Guix package may not have a version — check and update. Need commit ef20baba2318.
close_reason: Already at commit ef20baba2318 matching dolt v1.86.1 go.mod pin

title: Update dolt to v1.86.1 and required deps
description: Update dolt package to upstream v1.86.1 (2026-04-10). Also bump go-mysql-server to v0.20.1-0.20260408230922-6d219f1e7c8d and fslock to v0.0.0-20251215194149-ef20baba2318 to match dolt v1.86.1 go.mod pins. Other dolthub deps unchanged.
